notes:
Major UltraIPTV update:

• Improved stability when loading large playlists and during first startup
• Fixed unexpected exits when returning from playback
• More reliable Scheduled DVR recordings with new health checks
• New in-player audio language and subtitle selection
• Subtitle controls now appear only when tracks are available
• Safe startup recovery after interrupted launches
• Improved Live TV source selection and NAS/SMB tools
• General performance, navigation and reliability fixes
